# SCStreamError.Code.missingEntitlements

**Case**

An error message that indicates missing entitlements in your app.

## Declaration

```swift
case missingEntitlements
```

## Privacy and entitlements

- **SCStreamError.Code.userDeclined**: An error message that indicates the user didn’t grant Screen Recording permission to your app.
